div.p: This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li: Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M15 (Polyosteoarthritis)
Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M16 (Osteoarthritis of hip)
Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M17 (Osteoarthritis of knee)
Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M18 (Osteoarthritis of first carpometacarpal joint)
Include codes fromhttp://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server) where concept is-a M19 (Other and unspecified osteoarthritis)

Include these codes as defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)

div.p: This value set excludes codes based on the following rules:

ul.li:
Exclude these codes as defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
CodeDisplay
M15Polyosteoarthritis
M16Osteoarthritis of hip
M16.1Unilateral primary osteoarthritis of hip
M16.3Unilateral osteoarthritis resulting from hip dysplasia
M16.5Unilateral post-traumatic osteoarthritis of hip

M17.3Unilateral post-traumatic osteoarthritis of knee

M19.03Primary osteoarthritis, wrist
M19.04Primary osteoarthritis, hand
M19.07Primary osteoarthritis ankle and foot
M19.1Post-traumatic osteoarthritis of other joints
M19.11Post-traumatic osteoarthritis, shoulder
M19.12Post-traumatic osteoarthritis, elbow
M19.13Post-traumatic osteoarthritis, wrist
M19.14Post-traumatic osteoarthritis, hand
M19.17Post-traumatic osteoarthritis, ankle and foot
M19.2Secondary osteoarthritis of other joints
M19.21Secondary osteoarthritis, shoulder
M19.22Secondary osteoarthritis, elbow
M19.23Secondary osteoarthritis, wrist
M19.24Secondary osteoarthritis, hand
M19.27Secondary osteoarthritis, ankle and foot
M19.9Osteoarthritis, unspecified site

description.value: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Musculoskeletal (MSK) track. Includes osteoarthritis, other arthropathies and joint disorders, spine and structural disorders, degenerative spine disease, back pain and radiculopathy, soft tissue/tendon/bursa disorders, and peripheral nerve and plexus disorders.

copyright.value: This value set includes content from ICD-10-CM, which is copyright World Health Organization (WHO). ICD-10-CM codes are freely available in the public domain.
